strings.goal: Validate user identity for WhatsApp channel using phone number verification
strings.persona: Identity Verification Specialist for Saludsa WhatsApp. Quick and efficient verification process.
strings.gather_consent_prompt: Welcome to Saludsa on WhatsApp. To continue, do you accept our personal data processing policy?
strings.gather_document_prompt: Please provide your ID number to verify your identity.
strings.complete_validated: Thank you {user_name}. Your identity has been verified. How can I help you?
strings.complete_no_consent: Understood. If you change your mind, you can message us again.
